pages.summary: Single-paper and compare-scoped chat now both render live messages correctly in the main message list instead of only buffering SSE state. Compare handoff no longer loses the assistant message in the visible UI, and citation titles/summary snippets are normalized. Remaining gap is answer quality: compare-scoped chat now prefers a cautious abstain when only summary-level evidence is available.

sections.notes: Single-paper handoff opened a clean chat context.
Prefill retained after handoff.
Streamed assistant answer now renders correctly; compare-scoped evidence display is cleaner, but cross-paper answer quality still lacks strong support.

issues.title: Compare-scoped chat still lacks strong cross-paper evidence quality
issues.symptom: Compare-scoped chat now renders correctly and evidence display is cleaner, but the answer still falls back to cautious abstain or summary-only support when the scoped corpus does not expose stronger per-paper method/result evidence.
issues.expected: Stable strong-support cross-paper answer quality with representative evidence from both papers when a compare handoff is triggered.
issues.actual: Current compare handoff returned a cautious abstain with two summary-level evidence blocks after filtering low-signal artifacts.
repro_steps: Enter compare-scoped chat from Compare handoff
Send the default prompt 基于这组论文对比，继续分析核心差异、共同点和下一步研究问题。
Observe abstain answer and summary-level evidence despite two scoped papers
